quaternion_rotation_engine.rotation_speed_sync: BPM / 240 (Slow cinematic rotations) or BPM / 15 (Aggressive neuro-swirls)

dynamic_haas_panning.logic: IF velocity > 100 THEN δt = 15ms (L->R shift) ELSE δt = 0ms
dynamic_haas_panning.target: Adding 'weight' to accented notes through spatial offset

distance_attenuation_model.motion: Linear ramp from Back to Front over 8 bars (The 'Coming-at-you' effect)

aesthetic_fidelity_metrics_v4.impact_factor: Kick-to-Sub ratio = 1.25 (Kick always leads the sub-low transient)
aesthetic_fidelity_metrics_v4.transient_clarity: Crest factor target: 12-14dB (Preserving peak energy before limiting)
